.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Define the target Java version as an environment variable for the CI workflow.
Update the pre-commit action to a newer version compatible with the current tooling.
Update the checkout action to v4 for better performance and support.
Update the get-build-info action to a newer version.
Update the setup-java-build action to a newer version and explicitly pass the Java version.
Update the configure-git-author action to a newer version.
Update release and development version numbers to reflect the new release cycle.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add jobId parameter definition for use in asynchronous job tracking endpoints.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
jobIdParam:
    name: jobId
    in: path
    description: The identifier of a job.
    required: true
    type: string

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Extend group fields parameter to include hasSubgroups and description.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
* parentIds
* zones
* hasSubgroups
* description

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add allowableOperations to favorite fields parameter enum and description.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.before:
* path (note, this only applies to files and folders)
* properties
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
* path (note, this only applies to files and folders)
* properties
* allowableOperations

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Fix markdown formatting for special characters in node name description.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.before: The name must not contain spaces or the following special characters: * " < > \ / ? : and |.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after: The name must not contain spaces or the following special characters: * " `<` `>` \ / ? : and |.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add POST endpoint to initiate asynchronous node size calculation.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/size-details':
    post:
      tags:
        - nodes
      summary: Accepts request to generate Node Size Details

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add GET endpoint to retrieve results of asynchronous node size calculation.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/size-details/{jobId}':
    get:
      tags:
        - nodes
      summary: Get the result of a background job to get the size of a node.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add pagination parameters to secondary children endpoints.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
- $ref: '#/parameters/nodeAssocMinimalEntryIncludeParam'
        - $ref: '#/parameters/skipCountParam'
        - $ref: '#/parameters/maxItemsParam'
        - $ref: '#/parameters/fieldsParam'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add PreferenceBodyUpdate definition for updating preferences.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
PreferenceBodyUpdate:
    type: object
    required:
      - id
    properties:
      id:
        type: string
        description: The unique id of the preference
      value:
        type: string
        description: The value of the preference. Note that this can be of any JSON type.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add getNodeSizeDetailsResponse definition for size calculation results.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
getNodeSizeDetailsResponse:
    type: object
    properties:
      id:
        type: string
        description: Provides the nodeId for which POST/size-details has been initiated.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add sizeDetailsRequestResultEntry and sizeDetailsRequestExecResult definitions.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
sizeDetailsRequestResultEntry:
    type: object
    required:
      - entry
    properties:
      entry:
        $ref: '#/definitions/sizeDetailsRequestExecResult'
  sizeDetailsRequestExecResult:
    type: object
    required:
      - jobId
    properties:
      jobId:
        type: string
        description: The unique identifier of the size details execution request

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add AuthCodeEntry, AuthCode, and AuthKey definitions for reauthorization.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
AuthCodeEntry:
    type: object
    required:
      - entry
    properties:
      entry:
        $ref: '#/definitions/AuthCode'
  AuthCode:
    type: object
    required:
      - authorizationCode
    properties:
      authorizationCode:
        type: string
        example: johntest@5523945981643765984
  AuthKey:
    description: The encrypted authorization key received from the Alfresco Support.
    type: object
    required:
      - authorizationKey
    properties:
      authorizationKey:
        description: The Base64 encoded authorization key.
        type: string
        example: 5v02VjCqJmmOfs8My8yV1A7tcym2bIjA
